## Security Checklist

- [ ] I ran the test suite relevant to this change.
- [ ] I ran or verified the secret-scan workflow.
- [ ] I ran `composer audit` or confirmed the dependency audit workflow passed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` values are included in this PR.
- [ ] At least one reviewer has been assigned.

## Notes

Describe any security-sensitive impact, migration steps, or manual actions required after merge.
